Help Center

Workspace settings

Update your notification contact

Help-center articles should pass when they read like a single document, even if they are not stylistically identical to editorial pages. This one has one clear reading path, a short image, and ordered steps.

Before you start

  • Use an admin seat.
  • Keep the new contact inbox available.
  • Wait for the confirmation email before closing the tab.

Reset steps

  1. Open Settings → Notifications.
  2. Choose Change notification contact.
  3. Confirm the new address from the email link.

The related support rail belongs outside the clean reading output.
